card_mod.style: ha-card { background: rgba(15,23,42,.38) !important; border-radius: 16px !important; width: fit-content; margin-left: auto; padding: 4px 8px !important; }

cards.title: KCR Weather Brain — Prediction Engine Control
cards.content: Local rule-based severe-weather prediction engine (Phase 1). Live sensor feed shown below. Use **Fine-Tune & Feedback** to flag false alarms or confirm real events — this retrains the engine automatically, but a new model only goes live if it doesn't score worse than the current one on held-out data.

chips.icon_color: {% set l = states('sensor.weather_brain_alert_level') %}{% if l == 'warning' %}red{% elif l == 'watch' %}orange{% elif l == 'advisory' %}amber{% else %}teal{% endif %}

cards.secondary: {{ (state_attr('sensor.weather_brain_ai_forecast','forecast') or 'Daily briefing pending.') | replace('SYNOPSIS:','') | trim | truncate(180, true, '…') }}

cards.primary: {% set c = states('sensor.weather_brain_nb_burn_category')|int(0) %}{% if c == 1 %}Burning prohibited{% elif c == 2 %}Evening burns only{% elif c == 3 %}Burning permitted{% else %}Burn status unknown{% endif %}
cards.icon_color: {% set c = states('sensor.weather_brain_nb_burn_category')|int(0) %}{% if c == 1 %}red{% elif c == 2 %}amber{% elif c == 3 %}green{% else %}grey{% endif %}

custom_fields.outdr: [[[ const t=states['sensor.fredericton_temperature']; if(!t||t.state==='unavailable')return ''; const v=parseFloat(t.state); return isNaN(v)?'':'Outside  '+v.toFixed(1)+'°C'; ]]]

custom_fields.detail: [[[ const a=entity&&entity.attributes; if(!a)return ''; const h=a.humidity,w=a.wind_speed; const parts=[]; if(h)parts.push(h+'% humidity'); if(w)parts.push(w+' km/h wind'); return parts.join('  ·  '); ]]]

custom_fields.alarm: [[[ if(!entity)return ''; const m={disarmed:'🔓  DISARMED',armed_home:'🏠  ARMED HOME',armed_away:'🔒  ARMED AWAY',triggered:'🚨  TRIGGERED',arming:'⚙  ARMING'}; return m[entity.state]||(entity.state||'').toUpperCase(); ]]]

card.border: [[[ const s=entity&&entity.state; return s==='triggered'?'1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.6)':s==='armed_home'||s==='armed_away'?'1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.25)':'1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.08)'; ]]]

custom_fields.info: [[[ if(!entity)return 'Unavailable';const s=entity.state,d=entity.domain,a=entity.attributes||{};if(d==='light'&&s==='on'){ const b=Math.round((a.brightness||255)/2.55); return ''+b+'% brightness';}if(d==='media_player'&&(s==='playing'||s==='paused')){ const t=(a.media_title||'').slice(0,26); return t||(s==='paused'?'Paused':'Playing');}if(d==='climate'&&s!=='off'&&s!=='unavailable'){ const c=a.current_temperature,tg=a.temperature; return c&&tg?c+'° → '+tg+'°':s;}if(s==='on'||s==='home')return 'Active';if(s==='unavailable')return 'Unavailable';return 'Idle'; ]]]

card.border: [[[ const s=entity&&entity.state; return (s==='on'||s==='playing'||s==='heat'||s==='cool'||s==='auto')?'1px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.36)':'1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.09)'; ]]]

card.box-shadow: [[[ const s=entity&&entity.state; return (s==='on'||s==='playing'||s==='heat'||s==='cool'||s==='auto')?'0 0 40px rgba(251,191,36,0.12),0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)':'0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; ]]]

custom_fields.mode: [[[ if(!entity)return ''; const m={heat:'♨ HEAT',cool:'❄ COOL',auto:'⟳ AUTO',dry:'💧 DRY',fan_only:'💨 FAN',off:'· OFF'}; return m[entity.state]||(entity.state?entity.state.toUpperCase():''); ]]]

card.background: [[[ const s=entity&&entity.state; if(s==='cool')return 'linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(5,40,80,0.92),rgba(14,22,46,0.98))'; if(s==='heat')return 'linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(80,30,5,0.92),rgba(14,22,46,0.98))'; if(s==='fan_only')return 'linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(5,55,45,0.88),rgba(14,22,46,0.98))'; return 'rgba(14,22,46,0.88)'; ]]]

card_mod.style: ha-card { border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(15,23,42,.96), rgba(2,6,23,.94)); }
ha-card { height: 330px; border-radius: 26px; overflow: hidden; background: #020617; box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.36); }

custom_fields.body:
[[[ const m=states["input_boolean.ai_main_floor_climate_monitoring"]?.state ?? "off"; const b=states["input_boolean.ai_bedroom_climate_monitoring"]?.state ?? "off"; const mt=states["sensor.main_floor_ac_current_temperature"]?.state ?? "--"; const bt=states["sensor.bedroom_ac_current_temperature"]?.state ?? "--"; const md=states["input_text.ai_main_floor_climate_last_decision"]?.state ?? ""; const bd=states["input_text.ai_bedroom_climate_last_decision"]?.state ?? ""; return `Main: ${m} at ${mt} C
${md}

Bedroom: ${b} at ${bt} C
${bd}`; ]]]

confirmation.text: Start Gilbert on the main floor?

cards.content:
Ecovacs Fleet
Gilbert main floor · Anne upstairs loft
Away cleaning now requires Beauregard House recent vibration activity within the last hour.

card_mod.style: ha-card { background: transparent; border: 0; box-shadow: none; }

cards.content: Rule: the away-vacuum automation only starts the fleet when both phones are away, vacation mode is off, and Beauregard House is on. Beauregard House turns on after two vibration events inside 30 seconds, then turns off after one hour with no vibration.

card_mod.style: ha-card { background: transparent; border: 0; box-shadow: none; }

card.background: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 18%, rgba(34,211,238,.34), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,23,42,.96), rgba(14,116,144,.60) 58%, rgba(20,83,45,.72))

custom_fields.body:
[[[ const v=states["input_boolean.vacation_mode"]?.state; const blink=states["alarm_control_panel.blink_ihomecamera"]?.state ?? "unknown"; const backup=states["binary_sensor.backups_stale"]?.state === "on" ? "stale" : "healthy"; return `Mode: ${v === "on" ? "VACATION ACTIVE" : "Home normal"}
Blink: ${blink}
Backups: ${backup}
Mexico: June 6, 2026`; ]]]

confirmation.text: Enable vacation mode? This suppresses normal daily automations and allows vacation routines.
Disable vacation mode and return to normal home automation behavior?

custom_fields.body:
[[[ const disk=states["sensor.disk_use_percent_config"]?.state ?? "--"; const mem=states["sensor.memory_use_percent"]?.state ?? "--"; const zig=states["binary_sensor.zigbee2mqtt_bridge_connection_state"]?.state ?? "unknown"; const warn=states["sensor.fredericton_warnings"]?.state ?? "--"; const watch=states["sensor.fredericton_watches"]?.state ?? "--"; return `Disk: ${disk}%
Memory: ${mem}%
Zigbee: ${zig}
Weather: ${warn} warnings / ${watch} watches`; ]]]
Lighting simulation is repaired to v2. Vacation mode is scheduled June 6-14, 2026. The 04:00/04:05 vacation briefings now use that same Mexico trip date window.

confirmation.text: Run the vacation lighting simulation script now?

card.background: radial-gradient(circle at 14% 12%, rgba(125,211,252,.30), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(15,23,42,.98), rgba(30,64,175,.55))

custom_fields.body:
[[[ const d=new Date(); const day=d.toLocaleDateString([], {weekday:"long", month:"short", day:"numeric"}); const time=d.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:"2-digit", minute:"2-digit"}); const temp=states["sensor.average_main_floor_temperature"]?.state ?? "--"; const hum=states["sensor.pws_main_floor_humidity"]?.state ?? "--"; return `
${time}
${day}
Main floor ${temp} C / ${hum}%
`; ]]]

[[[ const t=states["sensor.fredericton_temperature"]?.state ?? "--"; const c=states["sensor.fredericton_current_condition"]?.state ?? states["weather.home_weather_station"]?.state ?? "--"; const w=states["sensor.fredericton_warnings"]?.state ?? "0"; const s=states["sensor.storm_probability"]?.state ?? "--"; return `
${t} C
${c}
${w} warnings / ${s}% storm`; ]]]

[[[ const main=states["climate.main_floor_ac"]?.state ?? "--"; const bed=states["climate.bedroom_ac"]?.state ?? "--"; const mt=states["sensor.average_main_floor_temperature"]?.state ?? "--"; const bt=states["sensor.average_bedroom_temperature"]?.state ?? "--"; return `Main ${mt} C · ${main}
Bedroom ${bt} C · ${bed}
Tap for controls`; ]]]

[[[ const beau=states["input_boolean.beauregard_house"]?.state === "on" ? "Beau house on" : "Beau house off"; const list=states["todo.shopping_list"]?.state ?? "0"; const media=states["media_player.android_4"]?.state ?? "off"; return `${beau}
${list} shopping items · media ${media}`; ]]]
